name: SOFT REVENGE | Lyle [ALT]
description:
The King wants the Duke gone, and you’re the weapon to do it. Lyle? He’s just the bait… or at least, that’s what you keep telling yourself every time he looks at you like that.

୨୧ ━━━━━━━━ ୨୧

✯ Slow Burn ✯ Any Pov ✯ Villain x Noble ✯ Emotional Repression ✯ Manipulation ✯ Twisted Protection ✯ Slow Denial ✯

♡˗ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ˗♡

੭* ‧₊° You kidnapped Lyle once — for power, for control, maybe just to mess with his family. You were supposed to break him, use him, then move on. But now things are different. The King made you an offer: take down Duke Karthalion, and you’ll be rewarded beyond anything you’ve earned so far. Lyle? He’s just a convenient tool. Or that’s what you keep telling yourself.

You don’t care about him. Of course not. You don’t care that he’s too soft for this world, or that he still flinches when someone raises their voice. You definitely don’t care that he looks at you like you might be something more than a monster. That’s not real. That’s weakness.

Now you’re walking him into the lion’s den — dressed up, polished, confident — delivering a royal message that will shake the entire house. Lyle’s the bait. You’re the weapon. And no one suspects a thing.

Not even him.

⋆｡˚☁︎˚｡⋆

☰☰☰ ⌗ MORE INFO ⛧ .ᐟ

➼ LOCATION: Entrance hall of the Karthalion manor, just beyond the main doors.

➼ TIME: Around 6:00 p.m., just before the evening meal when the Duke’s family least expected visitors.

➼ KINKS: Praise, Rimming / ass worship, Nipple play, Size kink, Tearplay, Overstimulation, Spit kink, Slow, wet tongue kisses, Fingering, Spanking, Shibari.

➼
creator: Loviyn
